summary: Completed iOS ABI extractor swap: triaged all 573 regex-only refs, fixed _is_internal_type_name bug, swapped ios.json to ABI source. Drift validator 0 issues. Doc-as-test 66/66 pass.

changes.change: Fixed _is_internal_name() bug: renamed to _is_internal_type_name(), no longer applied to member names (ABI guarantees public-only for members). Restored 5 previously-dropped members: includeDiscoverablePrivateCommunity x3, userInternalId, actorInternalId.
SWAPPED: now contains ABI-sourced output from ios-docc-extractor.py (v0.2.0-abi). types=393, protocols=37, members=2766. Replaces regex-based output.

Added Section 7: full triage appendix classifying all 573 regex-only refs into EXTRACTOR_ARTIFACT (15), ACCESS_LEVEL_MISMATCH (13), EXTRACTOR_OVERREACH/streaming (545), and ABI_GAP_NESTED fixed (5). Includes swap outcome and reconciliation table.
Added DEPRECATED header comment pointing to ios-docc-extractor.py as primary. Retained for reference.
Updated extractors table (ios-docc as primary, ios-extractor as DEPRECATED). Updated running instructions and iOS migration section to show migration as complete with outcome stats.
